hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE '\.fcstd' && printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(^|[|&;(`$ ])(unzip|zip|grep|egrep|fgrep|zgrep|zcat|cat|tac|sed|awk|head|tail|less|more|strings|xxd|hexdump|od|vi|vim|nano)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not read or edit .FCStd files with shell tools. Use the FreeCAD MCP bridge: get_connection_status, open_document, list_objects, inspect_object, execute_python, and macros. Only fall back to read-only unzip if the MCP bridge is genuinely unreachable, and ask the user first."}}'; fi
